title: ANC - ANC and Transparency are Off, make a call, ANC is off but active and Transparency is disabled
scenario: When ANC and Transparency are both off, making a call causes ANC to appear off but remain active and changeable, while Transparency becomes disabled and greyed out.
steps: Set ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) to OFF (no selected values).
Set Transparency to OFF (no selected values).
expected: ANC should appear off but remain active and changeable by the user. Transparency should become disabled (greyed out, not changeable by user) with no selected values.
